textByHash.dd17c1779dc090afd996e8f55f6c5759830a4d1b: Ah! Welcome back, old curtains! How did it go with the old princess down there? Did she agree to let me out?
textByHash.b09246a820257fc84706f2e587c44bc0bc5cf501: Oh, right. What was it then, old parrot?
textByHash.90f4a48b0900638c4e99386baebc3ecfa127e961: By all the gods! You have to go in there? You must be careful. She's a wily one that witch, from what I've heard. No doubt there's all sorts of weird magics over there!
textByHash.2db50a2802043398b5dc8fa25669295c38fcaed5: You've been in there? Goodness me! What did you see? Did you see a gnome in there anywhere?
textByHash.7a1c62af16a2e48805509f63e48f2ce944fae23a: Hmm, he was probably lucky that was all he lost with all that weird magic going on, eh?
textByHash.b836c01279be670aaa5bcb27303b9a27a32829c8: Ah! Good show, old kebab! I'll wait here for you. But don't be long. Who knows what that princess will do to me next!
